name: Ember of the Fire Giant
description: You gain resistance to fire damage and increase your Strength, Constitution, or Wisdom by 1. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one attack with a 15-foot-radius burst of flame centered on you. Each creature of your choice in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 + PB + ability mod) or take 1d8 + PB fire damage and be blinded until the start of your next turn. On a success, they take half damage. This can be used a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest, but only once per turn.
